svg.title: BFF trust boundary and auth flow
svg.desc: Left-to-right flow from User through Angular SPA in the untrusted browser zone, across the trust boundary to the .NET BFF, then out to Entra ID for OIDC and downstream to API, MS Graph, and SQL Server.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user initiate the OIDC login flow through the BFF?')
sendPrompt('What is the Angular SPA responsible for in the BFF pattern — what should it never hold?')
sendPrompt('Explain the two cookies: ep.bff.session (HttpOnly) and XSRF-TOKEN (readable). Why the split?')
sendPrompt('What are all the responsibilities of the BFF host in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the OIDC Authorization Code + PKCE flow between the BFF and Entra ID.')
sendPrompt('How should the downstream API validate the Bearer token forwarded by the BFF?')
sendPrompt('How does the BFF obtain a Graph token via refresh-token grant and why not reuse the API access token?')
sendPrompt('How should the API connect to SQL Server with managed identity instead of a connection string?')
